programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge starts a business selling healing crystals and other New Age products to the naive mothers of Springfield when Homer's work cuts children's health-care benefits.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Winter Of Our Monetized Content
programme.desc: When a video of Bart and Homer fighting goes viral, they begin a journey as social media celebrities.

programme.title: Fresh Off The Boat
programme.desc: Things are looking up for the Huangs when Louis gets the restaurant a billboard in a prime spot in Orlando. They even get an invite to the country club.

programme.title: Mythbusters: There's Your Problem
programme.desc: The Mythbusters plot a minty-fresh jailbreak using dental floss. Then, could antacid pills be used to blow your way out a jail cell?

programme.title: Curse Of Oak Island
programme.desc: Marty and Gary are amazed to discover that Samuel Ball may have ties to British royalty.

programme.title: Hyundai Country Calendar
programme.desc: A New Generation: A couple learn new skills as they take over running a high country farm.

programme.title: Hyundai Country Calendar
programme.desc: Nature's Growth: A farming couple grow their animals slowly and naturally to enhance the flavour of the meat.

programme.title: The Chase Australia
programme.desc: Australian version of the critically acclaimed game show. Four strangers work individually and as a team to build a cashpot. Standing in their way is the Chaser, one of the world's top trivia brains.

programme.title: Mythbusters: There's Your Problem
programme.desc: Can paper only be folded seven times, or is someone bending the truth? The MythBusters investigate whether toilet paper could be a prisoner's ticket to freedom.

programme.title: Mythbusters: There's Your Problem
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered whether the box or the cereal has more nutritional value? Does toast always land buttered side down? And can you really fry shrimp on the fly?

programme.title: The Office U.S
programme.desc: For the first time, we see what happens over eight weeks of the summer, as a Dunder Mifflin weight loss initiative causes the branch to diet and become obsessed with their weight.

programme.title: Fresh Off The Boat
programme.desc: Upon learning that Tiger Woods is half Thai, Louis and Jessica get inspired to groom Eddie and Evan into becoming the next great Asian golf prodigies.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer must supervise interns, one of whom is a real go-getter who asks Homer of all people to be his mentor!

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When the wrong man is arrested for pickpocketing Springfield during a street festival, Chief Wiggum sets out to catch the real criminal.

programme.title: The Paper
programme.desc: Season Finale: Ned stifles his desire to win at the Ohio Journalism Awards; Nicole uncovers Detrick's monogamy and becomes furious; Oscar comes to terms with the documentary.

programme.title: New: Educators
programme.desc: Season Finale: A detective from the Cyber Crime Task Force meets with Jarred to uncover his fake son’s crimes.

programme.title: New: Robin Hood
programme.desc: Grief boils into vengeance. Rob crosses a line, and the innocence in him dies. What rises in its place will shape the future of England.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: During the course of an investigation, the CSIs discover that their victim is the daughter of a wanted criminal.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When the CSI team investigates a case involving the world of domination, Grissom pays a visit to Lady Heather to help find some answers.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: After a shooting involving a young boy, none of the witnesses will speak to the CSI team investigating the case.

programme.title: Duke - Back In The Future
programme.desc: We'll catch you later on DUKE.

programme.title: On Duke Today...
programme.desc: Here's what's on DUKE today.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer must supervise interns, one of whom is a real go-getter who asks Homer of all people to be his mentor!

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When the wrong man is arrested for pickpocketing Springfield during a street festival, Chief Wiggum sets out to catch the real criminal.

programme.title: The Amazing Race Australia: Celebrity Edition
programme.desc: Our celebrities race into Phuket to secure a grand final spot. They dive into the real Phuket, from its stunning natural landscapes to the bustling old town, all in a thrilling, nail-biting finish.

programme.title: Saving Lives At Sea
programme.desc: On the north-eastern tip of Scotland, the crew at Wick begin a frantic search to find a paddleboarder who has drifted a mile out to sea, while her family wait anxiously on the shore.

programme.title: Engineering Reborn
programme.desc: After the discovery of oil in the 1930s, the seas around Bahrain became damaged through increased shipping and spillages, and sea life was decimated.

programme.title: Resto My Ride
programme.desc: Australian actor Andrew Daddo wants the coolest ride on Sydney’s Northern Beaches. Dec has other ideas on how the Resto should look and Andrew is kept in the dark until it’s time to reveal the car.

programme.title: NZ Hunter Adventures
programme.desc: Greg and Nigel tackle another classic South Westland adventure on the hunt for giant tahr and chamois. With young gun Cory in tow, can he match the pace of these old hands behind the rifle.

programme.title: New: Saving Lives At Sea
programme.desc: In Humber, the crew must work closely together to pull off the dangerous medivac of a fisherman with a spinal injury.

programme.title: New: Charter Boat Wars
programme.desc: With Online Fishing out of the race, it’s Two Up with everything to lose at the top of the leaderboard. The other three charters are all still in contention, but it’s Sharkmen who are on their tail.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Treehouse of Horror Special: Milhouse is trapped in another dimension; dead Homer's spirit tries some new bodies on for size; and Selma finds love in an unlikely place!

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: After a trip to a water park, Lisa's determined to set free Springfield's most vicious captive animals; Homer fulfils a lifelong dream.

programme.title: The Lord Of The Rings: The Rings Of Power
programme.desc: Season Finale: The free people of Middle-earth are in a constant struggle against the forces of darkness.

programme.title: Uncanny
programme.desc: Danny Robins meets Sybil, the manager of a shop where multiple staff witnessed the terrifying presence of a man who appeared to be watching their every move.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The prime suspect in a murder case from 12 years earlier comes to the forefront of a new CSI investigation.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When a popular young singer is found dead outside an infamous Las Vegas nightclub, the CSI team uncovers a link between the present day crime and a murder from over 50 years ago.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When a new murder leads to a connection with an infamous serial killer, Grissom secretly joins the class of well-known criminal pathologist Dr. Raymond Langston, to gain access to the killer.

programme.title: Duke - Back In The Future
programme.desc: We'll catch you later on DUKE.

programme.title: On Duke Today...
programme.desc: Here's what's on DUKE today.
